ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded market data */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the day */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, option, index) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Organization that issues the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument */,
  "CUSIP" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) identifier of the instrument */,
  "SEDOL" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) identifier of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade execution */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of instruments traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the market trend */,
  "action_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended actions based on the trend analysis */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  "trend_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend analysis (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the archived data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the archived market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument for the archived date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument for the archived date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument for the archived date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the archived date */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id")
)
